DispatchCondition.Title: Nose Gear Flight Interphone Jack Operates Normally

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Service interphone flight deck to ground/ground to flight deck function may be inoperative provided:

ListItem.Para: Nose gear flight interphone jack operates normally.
Alternate procedures are established and used.

OperationProcedure.Para: Use flight inter-phone for communication with ground crew during ground handling operations. In the event of a failure of the Service Inter-phone system after both engines are started, marshalling signals shall be used as an alternate cockpit to ground communication procedure.
Refer to Lido General Parts (Lido mPilot)-1. General Part—1.3 Aerodromes-1.3.2 Aerodrome Information Signs and Signals—1.3.2.3 Marshalling Signals -1.3.2.3.2 Pilot to Signalman

DispatchCondition.Title: Nose Gear Flight Interphone Jack Inoperative

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided alternate procedures are established and used.

OperationProcedure.Para: In the event of a failure of the Service Interphone system after both engines are started, marshalling signals shall be used as an alternate cockpit to ground communication procedure.
Refer to Lido General Parts (Lido mPilot)-1. General Part—1.3 Aerodromes-1.3.2 Aerodrome Information Signs and Signals—1.3.2.3 Marshalling Signals -1.3.2.3.2 Pilot to Signalman

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided procedures do not require its use.
